pages.translation: There were children in the village.

pages.hebrew: שֵׁם הַיָּלָד הָאָחִים הָיָה הַנְּזָל וְגִרְטֵל.
pages.translation: The children's names were Hansel and Gretel.
On the first day, the children went to the forest.
They found a small house made of candy.
The evil stepmother lived in the house.

pages.hebrew: הִיא לָקְחָה אֶת גִרְטֵל לַתּוֹךְ הַבַּיִת.
pages.translation: She took Gretel inside the house.
Hansel ran away from the house.
